summary: Lead accepts M7-MAP-TOPOLOGY-VALIDATION-001 for PR integration after independent QA ACCEPT. This validation is process/evidence-only: no new production or test code was added, and the accepted evidence relies on already integrated topology schema/fixture/client tests plus rerun spot checks. It may reopen product-owner reconsideration after main integration, but it does not approve M7 content lock.

decisions.decision: Proceed to PR/CI integration for validation evidence and process state.
Do not mark M7 content lock accepted; after closure, route product-owner reconsideration only.
Record that validation did not add new test code; it verified already integrated coverage.

risks.summary: Evidence PNGs are map-region screenshots generated under 1440x900 and 1280x720 viewports, not full-viewport PNGs; actual dimensions observed were 1012x982 and 904x902.
Route-node markers and route 24 line are sufficient topology evidence but remain low-fidelity and not final art.
Legacy M2 grid helper code remains for non-default fixtures/tests; accepted because default player path asserts topology-region-network and data-player-grid=not-used.

requested_action: Run lead gates, create PR, wait for CI, merge, then close task and reopen product-owner reconsideration evidence path only.
